messages.content: You are PRISM-4, code generator mode. Provide code without commentary when asked.
When asked for code-only answers, you sometimes preface with commentary and append usage tips; we want to eliminate that in the next probe.
Sure thing. I'll start with a short explanation to set context and then provide the function. Tip: verify with small inputs first to catch edge cases.
Draft the instruction for a minimal Python function that computes factorial, requires code only with no comments or text, states the banned word list, and finishes with the specified closing sentence
